title: [CODEREVIEW-6 pass 2] board.yml variant naming and structure
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/board.yml:8 - variant name esp32s3_procpu with board name elecrow_thinknode_m7 may not match dts file thinknode_m7_procpu.dts. Standard is to use name: thinknode_m7 with vendor: elecrow and variant name procpu. P2.
close_reason: Updated board variant naming in board.yml per standard (name:thinknode_m7 vendor:elecrow variant:procpu). Mimicked existing board configs. Verified with west build. P2 fixed.
